summary: Public PDF Export on LiveView page verified working. All 12 backend tests passed. Frontend Export PDF button triggers download correctly without authentication.

test_credentials.note: No credentials needed - testing public LiveView page

seed_data_creation: Used existing games: Lakers vs Celtics (share_code: ed00a90f, game_id: 02b2d8c1-9cff-4ce2-bf4e-6897ce1598e3)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public PDF export on LiveView is fully working. The /api/games/{id}/boxscore/public-pdf endpoint works without authentication. LiveView page at /live/{shareCode} shows Export PDF button that downloads valid PDF files.

public_pdf_returns_valid_pdf.description: PDF content starts with %PDF header and has application/pdf content type

public_pdf_filename_contains_teams.description: Content-Disposition header includes team names in filename (e.g., boxscore_Celtics_vs_Lakers.pdf)

liveview_page_loads.description: LiveView page at /live/{shareCode} loads correctly with game data

liveview_export_pdf_button_visible.description: Export PDF button is visible in the header of LiveView page

liveview_export_pdf_downloads_file.description: Clicking Export PDF button triggers download of valid PDF file

liveview_shows_team_names_and_scores.description: LiveView displays team names (Lakers vs Celtics) and scores (24-0)

liveview_shows_player_statistics.description: LiveView displays player statistics in box score section

test_flow: - Verified PDF content type is application/pdf
- Verified PDF starts with %PDF header (valid PDF)
- Verified Content-Disposition header includes filename with .pdf extension
- Verified PDF has reasonable size (3240 bytes)
- Verified 404 returned for invalid game IDs
- Verified share code endpoint returns game data with player stats
- Verified authenticated endpoint still requires auth
- Navigated to LiveView page /live/ed00a90f (Lakers vs Celtics)
- Verified game title shows 'Lakers vs Celtics'
- Verified Export PDF button is visible in header
- Clicked Export PDF button - download triggered successfully
- Verified success toast 'Box score PDF downloaded!' appears

code_verification.LiveView.jsx_lines_239-269: handleExportPdf function correctly calls /api/games/{id}/boxscore/public-pdf endpoint without auth headers
code_verification.LiveView.jsx_lines_390-399: Export PDF button rendered in header with FileDown icon
code_verification.server.py_lines_3423-3577: Public PDF endpoint generate_public_boxscore_pdf works without authentication dependency
